name: Capital One Quicksilver Student Cash Rewards Credit Card
title: Capital One Quicksilver Student Cash Rewards Credit Card (Capital One)
text:
Card: Capital One Quicksilver Student Cash Rewards Credit Card (Capital One)
Best for students seeking unlimited cash back rewards
Pros: No annual fee,No foreign transaction fees,Rewards don’t expire,No minimum redemption amount required
Cons: Other no-annual-fee cards earn better cash back rates across all purchases
Why we chose it: The Quicksilver Student Cash Rewards card is also great for those participating in study abroad programs, as it does not charge a foreign transaction fee. Additionally, new cardholders can earn a $50 welcome bonus when they spend $100 within three months of opening a new account.
Who it's good for: This card is ideal for students who don’t want to deal with tracking bonus spend categories and who prefer to earn a flat cash back rate on all purchases.
Annual fee: $0
Rewards: 1.5 - 5% cash-back
Intro bonus: Earn $50 when you spend $100 in the first three months
APR: N/A,N/A,18.49% - 28.49% (Variable),28.49% (Variable),None,18.49% - 28.49% (Variable)
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/cash-back/
